mapper.select: SELECT USR.USER_ID, USR.LOGIN_ID, USR.USER_NM AS USER_NAME, USR.USER_TYPE_CD, USR.DEPT_TEAM_CD AS DEPARTMENT_CD, USR.MOBILE_PHONE_NUM, USR.TEL_NUM, USR.EMAIL, USR.APPROVAL_TYPE_CD, USR.USER_STATUS_CD, ORG.CONN_ALLOW_YN_CD, ORG.ORG_NM AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, ORG.TEAM_TYPE_CD, ORG.HIGHER_ORG_ID, TO_CHAR(USR.LAST_APPROACH_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LAST_APPROACH_TIME, USR.TITL_TYPE_CD FROM TB_CONST_SUPER_ADMIN SUPER, TB_USER_MST USR, TB_ORG_MST ORG WHERE SUPER.SUPERMAN_ID = USR.USER_ID AND USR.DEPT_TEAM_CD = ORG.ORG_ID AND USR.USER_STATUS_CD = 'U'
SELECT CASE COUNT(*) WHEN 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END YN FROM TB_CONST_SUPER_ADMIN WHERE SUPERMAN_ID = #{USER_ID}
